name: Chocolate Pistachio Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, instant pistachio pudding, orange juice, water, eggs, and oil in a large mixing bowl. Blend until moistened.
2. Beat for an additional 2 minutes at medium speed.
3. Pour about three-quarters of the batter into a well-greased and floured tube pan.
4. Add chocolate syrup to the remaining batter and mix well.
5. Pour over the batter in the pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and sprinkle with confectioners sugar.
